bursaries.name: NSFAS Bursary
bursaries.description: Government-funded bursary for students at public universities and TVET colleges from low-income households. Covers tuition, registration, accommodation, learning materials, and transport.
bursaries.eligibility: South African citizen/permanent resident; combined household income ≤ R350,000 per year (≤ R600,000 for persons with disabilities); registered for approved programmes at public university or TVET.

bursaries.name: NSFAS Student Loan
bursaries.description: Loan for the 'missing-middle' students with household incomes between R350,001 and R600,000 per year at public institutions.
bursaries.eligibility: South African citizen/permanent resident; combined household income R350,001–R600,000 per year; registered at public university or TVET.

bursaries.name: Funza Lushaka Bursary
bursaries.description: Multi-year teaching bursary promoting teaching as a profession. Covers tuition, accommodation (including meals), books, learning materials, and a small living allowance. For B.Ed. or PGCE qualifications in priority subject areas.
bursaries.eligibility: South African citizen; 30 years old and below; accepted into approved B.Ed. or PGCE programme; good academic ability.

bursaries.name: Sasol Bursary
bursaries.description: Bursaries for full-time engineering and science studies at university. Offers 100% coverage of tuition fees at a registered South African public university. Also offers postgraduate bursaries for MSc, MEng, and PhD in Chemistry and Chemical Engineering.
bursaries.eligibility: South African citizen; planning to enrol full-time at a South African university; pursuing STEM fields.

bursaries.name: Motsepe Foundation Bursary
bursaries.description: Bursary funding for tuition fees, accommodation, textbooks, and essential study materials. Also provides a stipend.
bursaries.eligibility: South African citizen; demonstrate financial need; minimum 70% average in Matric (excluding Life Orientation).

bursaries.name: NRF Postgraduate Scholarship
bursaries.description: Postgraduate funding for Honours, Master's, and Doctoral studies. Covers tuition and research costs.
bursaries.eligibility: South African citizens; registered for postgraduate studies at a South African university.

bursaries.name: SITA Bursary
bursaries.description: Bursary promoting skills development in Information and Communication Technology (ICT). Covers tuition, study materials, meals, accommodation, allowances, and work-integrated learning.
bursaries.eligibility: South African citizen; completed Matric; pursuing ICT-related qualifications.

bursaries.name: Cyril Ramaphosa Education Trust (CRET) Bursary
bursaries.description: Comprehensive bursary covering tuition fees, textbooks, study materials, laptops, accommodation, meals, monthly living allowance, and transport.
bursaries.eligibility: Academically talented but financially disadvantaged South African students.

bursaries.name: StudyTrust Bursary
bursaries.description: Bursaries managed by StudyTrust on behalf of various corporate, foundation, and private donors. Covers tuition, accommodation, meals, and monthly stipend.
bursaries.eligibility: South African citizens; studying at TVET colleges, universities of technology, or universities.

bursaries.name: AgriSETA Bursary
bursaries.provider: Agriculture Sector Education and Training Authority (AgriSETA)
bursaries.description: Bursaries for training in farming, food safety, and agricultural studies, with bursaries for emerging farmers.
bursaries.eligibility: South African citizens; pursuing studies in agriculture-related fields.

bursaries.name: CHIETA Bursary
bursaries.provider: Chemical Industries Education and Training Authority (CHIETA)
bursaries.description: Bursaries for students in chemical and related industries.
bursaries.eligibility: South African citizens; pursuing studies in chemical or related fields.

bursaries.name: ETDP SETA Bursary
bursaries.provider: Education, Training and Development Practices SETA (ETDP SETA)
bursaries.description: Bursaries for unemployed students who do not have other sources of funding.
bursaries.eligibility: Unemployed South African students; not in any job that pays remuneration.

bursaries.name: FASSET Bursary
bursaries.description: Bursaries for students in finance, accounting, and related fields.
bursaries.eligibility: South African citizens; pursuing studies in finance, accounting, or related fields.

bursaries.name: Insurance SETA Bursary
bursaries.provider: Insurance Sector Education and Training Authority (INSETA)
bursaries.description: Bursaries available via the Insurance Sector Student Fund for courses including Insurance Agent, Actuary, Insurance Broker, Financial Investment Advisor, and Insurance Claims Administrator.
bursaries.eligibility: South African citizens; pursuing studies in insurance or financial services.

bursaries.name: MICT SETA Bursary
bursaries.provider: Media, Information and Communication Technology SETA (MICT SETA)
bursaries.description: Bursaries for full-time studies in IT, media, and telecommunications.
bursaries.eligibility: South African citizens; pursuing studies in IT, media, or telecommunications.

bursaries.name: Services SETA Bursary
bursaries.provider: Services Sector Education and Training Authority (Services SETA)
bursaries.description: Bursaries for skills development in hospitality, customer service, real estate, and entrepreneurship.
bursaries.eligibility: Unemployed South African youth.

bursaries.name: W&RSETA Bursary
bursaries.description: Funding for students in the wholesale and retail sector.
bursaries.eligibility: South African citizens; pursuing studies in wholesale or retail-related fields.

bursaries.name: Department of Health Bursary
bursaries.description: Bursaries for students pursuing health-related qualifications.
bursaries.eligibility: South African citizens; pursuing studies in health sciences or nursing.

bursaries.name: Department of Transport Bursary
bursaries.description: Bursaries for students in transport-related fields.
bursaries.eligibility: South African citizens; pursuing studies in transport, logistics, or related fields.

bursaries.name: Department of Agriculture Bursary
bursaries.provider: Department of Agriculture, Land Reform and Rural Development
bursaries.description: Bursaries for students in agriculture-related fields.
bursaries.eligibility: South African citizens; pursuing studies in agriculture or related fields.

bursaries.name: Sasria Bursary
bursaries.provider: Sasria (South African Special Risks Insurance Association)
bursaries.description: Bursary programme for students pursuing various fields of study.
bursaries.eligibility: South African citizens; studying towards undergraduate or postgraduate qualifications.

bursaries.name: Nedbank Bursary
bursaries.description: Bursary for academically deserving students with limited financial means, studying at a public university or university of technology.
bursaries.eligibility: South African citizens; limited financial means; studying at public university or university of technology.

bursaries.name: FirstRand Empowerment Foundation Bursary
bursaries.description: Bursary administered by StudyTrust. Covers full tuition fees, learning resources, accommodation, meals, and monthly stipend.
bursaries.eligibility: South African citizens; studying at public university or university of technology.

bursaries.name: Globeleq Education Trust Bursary
bursaries.description: Bursary for full-time students in renewable energy or related fields. Covers registration/tuition fees, accommodation, meals, books, and stationery.
bursaries.eligibility: South African citizens; studying full-time towards a qualification; interest in renewable energy.

bursaries.name: Thuthuka Bursary Fund
bursaries.provider: SAICA (South African Institute of Chartered Accountants)
bursaries.description: Bursary for students pursuing Chartered Accounting (CA(SA)) qualifications.
bursaries.eligibility: South African citizens; combined household income under R350,000 per year; pursuing CA(SA) qualifications.
